mood: Old leather pinkas (synagogue ledger) meets modern fintech. Dignified, warm, tabular, historical.
global_rules: Strictly RTL-first layout (`dir="rtl"` on html or root container).
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes in kebab-case based on role.
NO pure white (#FFFFFF) backgrounds for main surfaces; use warm parchment tones.
NO generic SaaS dashboard purple, mint, or teal.
NO Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans. Use the specified typography pairings.
Use Phosphor Icons (duotone or thin weight) for a refined, classic feel.

scale.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold text-brand-primary

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. The bento grid mode 'Control Room' for dashboards. 'Tactile & Crisp' surface strategy.
spacing_and_layout.sidebar: Right-aligned fixed sidebar (width: 280px). Background: Deep Ink-Burgundy (#4A1525) with Gold (#B58A3F) text accents, or pure Parchment with Ink text.

buttons.primary: bg-brand-primary text-[#FCFAF5] hover:bg-brand-primary_hover rounded-sm px-6 py-2 transition-colors font-medium border border-transparent
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-brand-accent text-brand-primary hover:bg-brand-accent hover:text-[#FCFAF5] rounded-sm px-6 py-2 transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-background-surface_alt text-text-secondary hover:text-text-primary px-4 py-2 transition-colors rounded-sm
buttons.auction_chip: bg-background-surface border border-borders-default hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-card hover:border-brand-accent text-lg font-mono px-4 py-3 rounded-md cursor-pointer transition-all active:scale-95

cards.base: bg-background-surface border border-borders-default rounded-md p-6 relative overflow-hidden

tables.header: border-b-2 border-brand-primary text-text-secondary font-serif text-lg py-3 px-4

badges.debt: bg-[#8B2E2E]/10 text-[#8B2E2E] px-2 py-1 rounded-sm text-xs font-bold
badges.paid: bg-[#2D5A4C]/10 text-[#2D5A4C] px-2 py-1 rounded-sm text-xs font-bold
badges.aliyah: bg-brand-accent/15 text-brand-primary px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-serif border border-brand-accent/30

inputs.base: bg-background-base border border-borders-default rounded-sm px-4 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-accent focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-accent transition-all text-text-primary placeholder:text-text-muted

dashboard.layout: Control Room grid. Top section: Parsha Banner (full width). Middle: 4 summary cards (Total Owed, Total Paid, Balance, Collection Rate). Bottom: Weekly Sales Chart (span 2) + Debt Alerts Feed (span 1).
dashboard.parsha_banner: Relative container. Background uses subtle parchment texture image with a dark burgundy overlay mask. Large Frank Ruhl Libre typography for the current Parsha name.

sales_auction_mode.layout: Two-column bento. Right (Main): Live Auction Entry. Left (Side): Recent sales feed / Likely buyers.
sales_auction_mode.live_entry: Massive typography for current price. Grid of quick-price chips (£10, £18, £25...) and increment chips (+5, +10...). Customer search input massive and focused.
sales_auction_mode.smart_suggestions: AI suggested buyers appear as subtle badges under the input, easily clickable.

sales_list_mode.layout: Full width table layout. Top action bar with filters and 'Switch to Auction Mode' button. Table shows Top Buyers highlighted.

customers.layout: Data-heavy list layout. Top right: 'Add Customer' primary CTA. Table columns: Name, Total Debt (colored red if > £200), Last Payment, Actions.
customers.debt_alert: Visual indicator (icon + text color) for customers with > £200 debt.

customer_detail.layout: Header: Customer Name + Debt Status + 'Download Statement' CTA. Below: 3-tab layout (Sales | Extras | Payments).
customer_detail.forms: Inline forms for Add Payment (with dropdown to link specific sale) and Add Extra.

products.layout: Card grid or list for standard Aliyos (Kohen, Levi, Shlishi, etc.). Ability to add custom products. Elegant badges for each product type.

calendar.layout: 4 Tabs. Tab 1: Month Grid (Gregorian + Hebrew side-by-side, today highlighted, parsha noted on Saturdays). Tab 2: Parshiyos List. Tab 3: Yomim Tovim. Tab 4: Aliyos Catalog.

transactions.layout: Master ledger view. Powerful filter bar at top. Table combines sales, payments, and extras. Chronological order.

images_urls.description: High-resolution aged paper texture. Use as a very subtle background for the Parsha Banner with a multiply/overlay blend mode to give it a 'pinkas' feel.
Synagogue interior architecture with arches. Can be used gracefully with heavy opacity reduction (10-15%) in empty states or the login screen background.
Crumpled gold foil texture. Use strictly as a masked background for the 'Premium/Top Buyer' badges or the primary highlight chip, ensuring text contrast.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `@phosphor-icons/react` and use it exclusively for iconography.

Implement the entire UI wrapped in a `dir="rtl"` container. Ensure margins and paddings follow RTL logic (e.g., `mr-` instead of `ml-`, or better yet, use logical properties like `ms-` and `me-` if Tailwind version supports, else standard tailwind RTL prefix `rtl:ml-` etc).
Load Google Fonts: 'Frank Ruhl Libre', 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Assistant', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'Space Mono'.
DO NOT use generic Shadcn components out of the box if they rely heavily on LTR assumptions. Adjust their alignments or build custom components following the HTML/Tailwind strategy.
Prioritize tabular numbers (`font-mono` or `font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums`) for all monetary values.
Add `data-testid` to EVERY button, input, and interactive tab.
All text sizes should be explicit, do not rely on browser defaults.
If implementing Recharts for the Weekly Sales Chart, ensure the Y-axis is on the right side to respect RTL reading order, and tooltips are formatted with the £ symbol.
All currency must be formatted as British Pounds (£).
